# code/src/mobile/src/graphql/generated — Auto-Generated GraphQL Types

All files in this directory are machine-generated by GraphQL Code Generator. Do not edit manually.

## Regenerating

```bash
bash code/src/scripts/development/server.sh codegen:mobile
```

This reads all `.graphql` files from `../fragments/`, `../queries/`, and `../mutations/`, introspects the backend schema, and writes typed React hooks and TypeScript interfaces here.

## Rules

- Never commit hand-edits to generated files — they will be overwritten on the next codegen run
- The entire directory is excluded from ESLint and TypeScript strict checks (see root `eslint.config.mjs` ignore list)
- Commit generated output — it must be present in CI so consumers can import without running codegen first

## Cross-references

- `code/src/mobile/src/graphql/CONTEXT.md` — parent layer with full codegen workflow
- `code/src/mobile/codegen.ts` — codegen configuration
